label: Level 3 or above qualifications (Northern Ireland)
subtitle: Percentage of people aged 16 to 64 with Level 3 or above qualifications
description: This indicator shows the percentage of the population aged 16 to 64 with Regulated Qualifications Framework (RQF) level 3+ qualifications, in Northern Ireland, for 2016 to 2023.
caveats:
Figures produced by NISRA may differ slightly to other highest qualification levels statistical publications, either due to differing sources, age analysed or slight differences in methodologies for assigning highest qualifications levels.

Updates to this indicator have been temporarily suspended until the APS reweighting is implemented in 2026.
topic: Education and skills - Attainment and participation
